_source.title: Dynamics of the Elongation of Internodes in Maize (Zea mays L.): Analysis of Phases of Elongation and their Relationships to Phytomer Development

axes.x: Thermal time since plant emergence (°Cd), Tb = 10 °C

_digitization.tool: Not WebPlotDigitizer — eyeballed anchors at TT = 460, 470, ..., 640 °Cd.

estimated_precision.il_cm: ±1.0 cm (compared to ±0.5 cm for WPD on this figure)

_digitization.refine_if: S3b.5 residual between target-under-thin and this curve lands within ±10–15%. In that case, redo with WPD to halve the uncertainty band before writeup.
_digitization.plan_reference: Replaces plan-nominated 'Birch 2002 Déa Fig-4' — Birch 2002 Fig 4 is apex H for P3527+C87 (not Déa, not per-rank). Per-rank Déa H(TT) exists only in Fournier 2000 Fig 6A. Plan source list already cites Fournier 2000; only Figure/paper pointer needs correcting.

_notes_on_asymptotes: Max internode length in Déa ~22 cm, peaks at ranks 9-11 per Birch 2002 Fig 6a text ("maximum... occurred on internodes 9 and 10. Above internode 11, internode length declined"). Ranks 13-15 are still rising at TT=640 °Cd where the figure ends; their final asymptotes are not captured here but are ~20, ~16, ~11 cm per Birch 2002 Fig 6a Déa static data.
